posts.title: Guardrails Are Not Constraints — They Are the Operating Model
posts.excerpt: Most AI failures don't start with bad models. They start with good intentions and no guardrails. Here's why accountability is your real operating model.
posts.author: Ajeet Chouksey

posts.title: Agents Aren't a Feature — They're a New Execution Layer
posts.excerpt: Most software waits. Agents break that contract. Here's why treating agents as a feature instead of a new execution layer is the most common architectural mistake.
